place: Kamala Soi 16, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Seven-Bedroom Family Villa with 20-Metre Pool above Kamala Beach
note: Private chef · 3 staff · beach shuttle · airport transfer
blurb: A seven-bedroom villa set above the shoreline at Kamala, built for families and larger groups with a 20-metre infinity pool, a separate children's pool and a dedicated family room. Gym, mahjong and open-plan living open to sea and greenery, with a three-strong team and a private chef, sleeping up to eighteen.
detail:
Set on the hillside above Kamala Beach, this seven-bedroom villa is designed for families and larger groups — plush private bedrooms alongside a charming family room built for both children and adults, with a breathtaking view of the sea and the surrounding greenery.

A 20-metre infinity pool runs the main terrace, with a separate shallow children's pool alongside, so the whole party can spread out. Two masters, four guest bedrooms and the family room sleep up to eighteen, arranged around open-plan living and dining that flows to indoor and outdoor tables.

An entertainment room with a gym and a mahjong table keeps everyone occupied after the beach, and a BBQ, high-speed WiFi, safety boxes, baby cots and high chairs cover a family's needs. Covered parking takes two cars.

A team of three, including a private chef, runs the villa, with housekeeping, turndown, a return airport transfer and a complimentary beach shuttle (with a day's notice) included; car and van hire, massage, laundry and a wine list are arranged on request. Kamala and Patong beaches are about five kilometres away.

features.l: 20 m infinity pool with separate kids' pool
Dedicated family room for kids & adults
Open-plan living opening to sea views
Sleeps up to eighteen across seven bedrooms
Private chef, three staff & beach shuttle
